title: Junior Backend Developer
description: Plaid is hiring a Junior Backend Developer to help build the infrastructure that powers financial connectivity. You'll develop APIs and backend services used by millions of developers and companies. This remote role offers the opportunity to grow your skills while working on fintech technology that shapes how people and companies access and use financial data.
responsibilities: Develop and maintain backend services and APIs using Python or Node.js
Design and optimize database schemas and queries for performance
Implement features following agile development practices
Write unit tests and participate in code reviews
Collaborate with product and frontend teams on feature specifications

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field
skills: Proficiency in Python, Java, or Node.js
Understanding of relational and NoSQL databases
Familiarity with REST API design and HTTP
Basic knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS, GCP)

benefits: Comprehensive health, vision, and dental coverage
